creator: rivers@dignus.com
text:
> Just wait for 2 days' news feed then it may die.

 Perhaps I missed it; but you didn't provide the symptoms
 of why it's dieing..

 I mean, not to be too facetious; but it could be little gremlins
 running around and hitting the power button :-)

 I'm interested in what panic's you're seeing; or perhaps a kernel-dump
traceback.

	 - Thanks -
	- Dave Rivers -
